---
name: Private security report
about: Do not open a public issue for vulnerabilities or sensitive data exposure.
title: "security: "
labels: security
---

Please do not submit sensitive security details through this public issue template.

Use the repository private security policy instead:

https://github.com/ztwz11/moneysiren/security/policy

Never paste API keys, OAuth tokens, webhook URLs, account IDs, project IDs, invoice IDs, emails, billing profile data, raw provider responses, local AI prompt text, shell command bodies, raw JSONL lines, auth file contents, or exploit details into a public issue.
